Title: Add organization
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Go to Contacts tab
2. Click 'Add' > Select 'Organization'
3. Select user group, enter business category and description
4. Verify 'Create' button inactive (Name required)
5. Fill in Name field
6. Click 'Create'
Expected Result:
1. Create button inactive without Name
2. Organization created and found in contacts list

2. Click 'Add' > Select 'Employee'
3. Fill in required fields
4. Click 'Create'
Expected Result: New employee created and found in contacts list

Title: Add contact to organization

Admin logged in to Backend

Title: Add account to customer or employee
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Employee [CUST-002] or Customer [CUST-003] exists
Steps:
1. Open contact > Go to Accounts section
2. Click 'Add'
3. Select store for account association
4. Enter login
5. Start entering password > Verify security rules appear
6. Enter valid password > Verify rules disappear
7. Enter mismatched repeat password > Verify error
8. Enter matching password > Create account
Expected Result: Account created with store association. Password rules enforced correctly.

Title: Search operators and indexed property rules
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Contacts with indexed data
Steps:

2. Use NOT (!) operator > Verify exclusion
3. Search single word > Verify contains match
4. Search with space delimiter > Verify results
5. Use firstName: rule > Verify first name search
6. Use memberType: rule > Verify type filter
7. Use createddate:[start TO end] > Verify date range (inclusive)
8. Use createddate:(start TO end) > Verify date range (exclusive)
9. Use modifieddate:[start TO] > Verify single-bound range
Expected Result: All search operators and indexed property rules work correctly
